items.bullet: Saline Township Board meets July 14 to consider an IFEC application; agenda provides no project details.
Saline Twp board meets July 14 to consider an IFEC application; agenda provides no project details.
Ypsilanti Twp seeks 12-month water/sewer moratorium for data centers citing 5M gallons daily use on 144-acre U-M site.
Ypsilanti Township board meets July 15 on 144-acre UM-Los Alamos site after passing resolutions that secured a 12-month water/sewer moratorium for data centers.
